ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Continued To Dec-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney David Sauers to appear on December 16, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal, Prtition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal, Prtition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Alexandra Porshnikoff (Conservator).

Mr. Sauers stated that he thought the Creditor's Claim was resolved in litigation but that it wasn't, that he prepared and submitted a First and Final Inventory to the Probate Referee two weeks ago and that the only issue that remains is the Department of Health Services ("DHS") Creditor's Claim. Mr. Sauers also stated that the Estate is cash poor, that he is trying to work out a compromise with DHS, that the Beneficiaries of the Trust are the Executor and her Brother, and that they both reside at the Silver Street property. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to petition for additional time to administer the Estate and provide notice to the Parties. Status on filing of the final inventory and appraisal, and petition for final distribution or report of status of administration was continued to March 11, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal, Prtition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Continued To Jan-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Alexandra Porshnikoff (Executor).

Mr. Sauers stated they resolved the issue of the Creditor of the Son's trust, that they received the documents to be used to convey the Silver Avenue property from the Trust to the Estate, and that the inventory and appraisal will be ready in a matter of days and submitted to the Probate Referee. Mr. Sauers also stated that they are going to try and work something out with the Department of Health Services with regard to the $64,000.00 claim, that the Beneficiaries intend to continue to reside in the property and that the petition for final distribution can be presented on a waiver of account. Status on a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Report of Status of Administration was continued to January 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal, Prtition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To Sep-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Alexandra Porshnikoff.

Mr. Sauers stated that they are making progress, that Alexandra substituted in Nikolai's (Son) Trust as Successor Trustee in December 2013, that she has rejected four Creditor's Claims and that no one has taken any action. In addition, Mr. Sauers stated that they plan to transfer the Silver Avenue property to this Estate pursuant to a Notice of Proposed Action and that they can submit a request for appointment of a Probate Referee. Status on close of the Estate was continued to September 17, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal, Prtition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Continued To Mar-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Executor.

Mr. Sauers stated that any estate assets are dependant upon administration of the Trust of Ms. Porshnikoff's late Son, that the Trust (287050) still does not have a Trustee, that he filed his Client's Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee and that there are numerous Creditors in the Trust. Status on filing of a Final Inventory and Petition for Final Distribution or Report of Status of Administration was continued to March 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal, Prtition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Continued To Oct-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Alexandra Porshnikoff.

Mr. Sauers stated that they are making progress but that it is taking more time than expected. In addition, he stated that he is hopeful to get cooperation of all of the Beneficiaries and consents of his Clients appointment as Trustee of the deceased Son's Trust. Status on close of the Estate was continued to October 16, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal, Prtition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Continued To Jun-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Executor.

Status of closing of the Estate was continued to June 12, 2012 at 9:00, in Dept. 204 for status of filing of a Petition to Appoint a Successor Trustee in the deceased Son's Trust.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal, Prtition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Continued To Jan-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Alexandra Porshnikoff.

The matter was continued to January 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Sauers to file a petition for appointment of his Client as Trustee of Nikoli's Trust.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.
